goal: Translate all financial documents in container_001 to German

spec.code_intent: Call get_active_documents_metadata; filter category=='financial' and status=='ACTIVE'; return doc_ids and count.
Iterate ${T1.doc_ids} in chunks of 200. Call translate_document_preserving_structure(document_id=chunk, destinationLanguageThreeLetterCode='deu', container_id=...). Emit progress markers per chunk.
